shortDescription: Income-generating duplex in Junction Triangle with 6 bedrooms across two self-contained units.
fullDescription: Welcome to 410 Keele Street in the vibrant Junction Triangle neighbourhood. This income-producing duplex features two self-contained units, each with its own entrance and utilities. The main living area impresses with nine-foot ceilings, designer fixtures, and a seamless flow between rooms. The kitchen offers ample counter space, premium fixtures, and a convenient eat-in dining area. All 6 bedrooms are generously sized, and the primary offers a spa-inspired four-piece ensuite. A private outdoor space — perfect for morning coffee or summer entertaining — completes the package. The location is unbeatable: steps to TTC transit, acclaimed restaurants, and everyday shopping.
keyFeatures: Chef’s kitchen with granite countertops and premium appliances
